description: Delete legacy TypeScript files replaced by Rust rewrite

userStories.title: Delete legacy core TypeScript files
userStories.description: Delete the following legacy core files that have been replaced by Rust: packages/baro-app/src/core/claude-planner.ts, packages/baro-app/src/core/cli-task.ts, packages/baro-app/src/core/dag.ts, packages/baro-app/src/core/events.ts, packages/baro-app/src/core/executor.ts, packages/baro-app/src/core/git.ts. DO NOT delete: planner.ts, stream.ts, tools.ts, openai-planner.ts, prd.ts — these are still used.

userStories.title: Delete legacy screens directory and Ink entry points
userStories.description: Delete the entire packages/baro-app/src/screens/ directory (ApiKeyScreen.tsx, ExecuteScreen.tsx, PlanScreen.tsx, ReviewScreen.tsx) and the old Ink entry points: packages/baro-app/src/App.tsx and packages/baro-app/src/cli.tsx. These have been replaced by Rust ratatui screens.

userStories.title: Verify tsup build still works for openai-planner
userStories.description: After S1 and S2 deletions, verify the tsup build script in package.json ('tsup src/core/openai-planner.ts --format esm') still compiles successfully. The build entry point is openai-planner.ts which imports only from planner.ts, stream.ts, tools.ts, and prd.ts — all of which are kept. If the build fails, fix any issues. Also verify there are no stale references to deleted files in tsconfig.json or package.json that need cleanup.
